name: Oven Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 11" x 7" inches baking dish, arrange chicken. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
2. In a small bowl, combine soup, brown sugar, water, vinegar and Worcestershire sauce; spoon over chicken.
3. Bake 30 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink and juices run clear. Stir sauce before serving. Serve with rice or noodles.
Preparation: 5 min. Cooking time: 1 hour
